data.title: Update test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh for new gates
data.description:
Update tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh to add assertions for new gates:
- test_anti_pattern_scan_mandatory: verify SKILL.md contains Step 7.5 as mandatory step
- test_agent_separation_gate_documented: verify SKILL.md contains root_cause_report enforcement

TDD exemption: integration exemption criterion 1 — existing test file extends coverage for changed behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Updated test passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh
- [ ] New test functions exist in file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_anti_pattern_scan_mandatory\|test_agent_separation_gate' tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh
